scope: Port donor startup migration runner shape into AgenC config and settings migrations without making config reloads mutate disk.

requiredBehaviors: Normalize legacy model provider key aliases before raw config normalization.
Migrate replBridgeEnabled into the typed remoteControlAtStartup config key.
Normalize providers.xai into providers.grok without rewriting configured request model IDs.
Keep loadConfig and ConfigStore.reload free of settings-file side effects.
edgeCases: canonical top-level provider key wins over alias
canonical profile model_provider wins over provider aliases

requiredBehaviors: Run settings-file migrations only from explicit startup call sites.
Persist configMigrationVersion markers in the settings JSON file each migration mutates.
Reload the config store only when startup migrations write files.
edgeCases: malformed existing settings files are warned and preserved
preflight and bootstrap duplicate calls are idempotent

requiredBehaviors: Move legacy bypass permission acceptance into user settings bypassPermissionsModeAcceptedIn for the resolved workspace.
Move project MCP approval keys into local settings with deduplication.
Remove project MCP approval keys only after local settings write succeeds.
Advance local project marker only after local write and project cleanup succeed.
edgeCases: missing workspace does not advance the user marker
existing accepted workspace is preserved without duplication
enabled and disabled MCP arrays are deduped
stale project keys are cleaned after successful local migration

requiredBehaviors: Do not execute donor auto-update migration because AgenC has no live updater path and current defaults obscure explicit user intent.
Do not rewrite configured request model IDs without a verified provider request deprecation table.
edgeCases: grok-4 remains unchanged because it is still in the built-in catalog
context-window aliases do not silently change user config
